reference_payload_text:
SPIKE-8B real-camera validation reference carrier.
P3.A substrate (ArUco DICT_4X4_50 corners + spike-7 codebook).
Authored 2026-05-04 on branch claude/phase-0-v5-handoff-Sx50S.
If you're reading this from a decoded phone capture, the round-trip survived display + camera + JPEG. That's the win condition.
reference_carrier_purpose: spike-8B real-camera validation. Display this PNG full-screen on each test screen and capture with each test phone per CAPTURE_PROTOCOL.md.
